ModMetaData.name: RimTalk No Thinking (Aliyun Qwen)
ModMetaData.author: Community
ModMetaData.description:
Disables thinking mode for Aliyun Qwen models in RimTalk. This mod automatically injects the necessary parameters to disable thinking for requests sent to aliyuncs.com domains.
Features: - Automatically detects RimTalk requests to Aliyun Qwen (aliyuncs.com) - Injects extra_body.enable_thinking = false to disable thinking mode - Simple toggle to enable/disable the functionality - No configuration required - works out of the box
Requires RimTalk mod to be installed.
